name: Improved AI Exam Workflow - Fixed Final

parameters.responseBody:
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Failed to save draft exam",
  "message": "Could not create initial exam record",
  "details": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Save Draft Exam'].json) }},
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Google AI request failed",
  "message": "Could not generate questions using AI",
  "exam_id": "{{ $node['Save Draft Exam'].json.exam_id }}",
  "details": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Google AI Request'].json) }},
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Failed to update exam with questions",
  "message": "Questions generated but database update failed",
  "exam_id": "{{ $node['Save Draft Exam'].json.exam_id }}",
  "questions_generated": {{ $node['Process AI Response'].json.questions.length }},
  "details": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Update Exam with Questions'].json) }},
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
